summary: Iteration 15: Teacher Grade Book Feature - Backend 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend 100% verified. All gradebook endpoints working correctly with proper RBAC enforcement.
critical_code_review_comments: GradeBook page correctly implements spreadsheet format with students as rows and assignments as columns
Inline editing works with save/cancel buttons and keyboard shortcuts (Enter to save, Escape to cancel)
Add Assignment modal includes subject select, assignment name, max score, term, and bulk score entry for all students
Subject filter dropdown correctly filters the gradebook table
Student averages are calculated and displayed in the last column with color-coded grades
Summary cards show correct counts (Students, Assignments, Class Average, Total Grades)
Teacher navigation includes Grade Book link between Dashboard and My Students
Non-teacher users (coach, player) correctly get 403 from backend API and see 'Failed to load gradebook' error
Letter grade calculation is correct (A+ for 97%+, A for 93%+, etc.)
Bulk grade creation works correctly with proper percentage and letter grade calculation

backend_endpoints.GET /api/teachers/gradebook: ✓ Returns students, grades, subjects, assignments for logged-in teacher
backend_endpoints.POST /api/teachers/gradebook/entry: ✓ Creates new grade with correct letter grade and percentage
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/teachers/gradebook/entry/{id}: ✓ Updates existing grade score and recalculates letter grade
backend_endpoints.POST /api/teachers/gradebook/bulk: ✓ Creates multiple grades at once for one assignment

frontend_features.gradebook_page: ✓ Renders spreadsheet table with students as rows and assignments as columns
frontend_features.inline_editing: ✓ Grade cells are clickable for inline editing with save/cancel buttons
frontend_features.add_assignment_modal: ✓ Opens modal with subject select, assignment name, max score, and bulk score entry
frontend_features.subject_filter: ✓ Subject filter dropdown filters the gradebook table
frontend_features.student_averages: ✓ Shown in the last column with color-coded grades
frontend_features.summary_cards: ✓ Show correct counts (8 Students, 6 Assignments, 88.9% Class Average, 41 Total Grades)
frontend_features.teacher_navigation: ✓ Grade Book link appears between Dashboard and My Students

rbac.coach_denied: ✓ Coach gets 403 when accessing gradebook API
rbac.player_denied: ✓ Player gets 403 when accessing gradebook API
rbac.frontend_rbac: ✓ Non-teachers see 'Failed to load gradebook' error when navigating to /GradeBook

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and grades from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15: Teacher Grade Book feature complete. Teachers can view grades in spreadsheet format, add assignments with bulk grade entry, edit grades inline, and filter by subject. Backend endpoints at /api/teachers/gradebook/* are protected by teacher role check. Math teacher (s.mitchell) sees 8 students with Mathematics grades. Science teacher (r.park) sees Biology grades. Non-teachers get 403 from API. All 22 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
